scope: Additional technical terms encountered in translation installment 03 (Surat Al 'Imran).

terms.english: the first occurrence / the second occurrence
terms.note: These qualifiers are crucial in 'add al-ayy because the same word may recur in a surah while only one occurrence is disputed.

terms.english: to stand alone; to be unique in the count
terms.note: A formula used when one counting authority alone counts or omits a given place.
In this work it often means to confirm that a place is to be counted as a verse ending for a named authority.

terms.english: to be transmitted; its counting is reported
terms.note: Used for a transmitted verse-counting judgment rather than a purely deductive one.

terms.english: left uncounted; omitted in the count
terms.note: The opposite of affirming a place as a counted fasilah.
